ddls:
CREATE TABLE "medical_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical image */,
  "image_filename" TEXT /* Filename of the uploaded image */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient associated with the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was uploaded */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of the medical image (e.g., X-ray, MRI, CT) */,
  "image_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the image (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "upload_user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who uploaded the image */,
  "image_comments" TEXT /* Any comments or notes about the image */,
  "image_status" TEXT /* Status of the image (e.g., pending review, reviewed, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_images_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_images_upload_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("upload_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the medical condition (e.g., Atelectasis, Pneumonia) */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the condition */,
  "condition_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the condition (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  "condition_prevalence" TEXT /* Prevalence rate of the condition in the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_condition_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical image being annotated */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition being annotated */,
  "is_present" INTEGER /* Indicates if the condition is present in the image (true/false) */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was made */,
  "annotated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the annotation */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the annotation */,
  "annotation_comments" TEXT /* Any comments or notes about the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_condition_annotations_annotated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_condition_annotations_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES medical_images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_condition_annotations_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "patient_address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "patient_contact" TEXT /* Contact information (e.g., phone number, email) */,
  "patient_medical_history" TEXT /* Any relevant medical history */,
  "patient_allergies" TEXT /* Known allergies */,
  "patient_treatment_history" TEXT /* History of treatments received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for platform access */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., radiologist, technician, admin) */,
  "user_full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., radiology, administration) */,
  "user_specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the user (e.g., radiologist, technician) */,
  "user_licensing" TEXT /* Licensing information (e.g., medical license number) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the image */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, annotate) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the system (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "access_comments" TEXT /* Any comments or notes about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES medical_images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
